ayahs.textArabic: قٓۚ وَٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ ٱلۡمَجِيدِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qaf waalqurani almajeedi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Qaf. By the honored Qur'an...
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Qãf. By the glorious Quran!

ayahs.textArabic: بَلۡ عَجِبُوٓاْ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٞ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَقَالَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا شَيۡءٌ عَجِيبٌ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Bal AAajiboo an jaahum munthirun minhum faqala alkafiroona hatha shayon AAajeebun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: But they wonder that there has come to them a warner from among themselves, and the disbelievers say, "This is an amazing thing.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹All will be resurrected,˺ yet the deniers are astonished that a warner has come to them from among themselves ˹warning of resurrection˺. So the disbelievers say, “This is an astonishing thing!

ayahs.textArabic: أَءِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابٗاۖ ذَٰلِكَ رَجۡعُۢ بَعِيدٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Aitha mitna wakunna turaban thalika rajAAun baAAeedun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: When we have died and have become dust, [we will return to life]? That is a distant return."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹Will we be returned to life,˺ when we are dead and reduced to dust? Such a return is impossible.”

ayahs.textArabic: قَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا مَا تَنقُصُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ مِنۡهُمۡۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَٰبٌ حَفِيظُۢ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qad AAalimna ma tanqusu alardu minhum waAAindana kitabun hafeethun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: We know what the earth diminishes of them, and with Us is a retaining record.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We certainly know what the earth consumes of them ˹after their death˺, and with us is a well-preserved Record.

ayahs.textArabic: بَلۡ كَذَّبُواْ بِٱلۡحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ فَهُمۡ فِيٓ أَمۡرٖ مَّرِيجٍ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Bal kaththaboo bialhaqqi lamma jaahum fahum fee amrin mareejin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: But they denied the truth when it came to them, so they are in a confused condition.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: In fact, they reject the truth when it has come to them, so they are in a confused state.

ayahs.textArabic: أَفَلَمۡ يَنظُرُوٓاْ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَوۡقَهُمۡ كَيۡفَ بَنَيۡنَٰهَا وَزَيَّنَّٰهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِن فُرُوجٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Afalam yanthuroo ila alssamai fawqahum kayfa banaynaha wazayyannaha wama laha min furoojin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Have they not looked at the heaven above them - how We structured it and adorned it and [how] it has no rifts?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Have they not then looked at the sky above them: how We built it and adorned it ˹with stars˺, leaving it flawless?

ayahs.textArabic: وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ مَدَدۡنَٰهَا وَأَلۡقَيۡنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِيَ وَأَنۢبَتۡنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجِۭ بَهِيجٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waalarda madadnaha waalqayna feeha rawasiya waanbatna feeha min kulli zawjin baheejin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the earth - We spread it out and cast therein firmly set mountains and made grow therein [something] of every beautiful kind,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: As for the earth, We spread it out and placed upon it firm mountains, and produced in it every type of pleasant plant—

ayahs.textArabic: تَبۡصِرَةٗ وَذِكۡرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبۡدٖ مُّنِيبٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Tabsiratan wathikra likulli AAabdin muneebin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Giving insight and a reminder for every servant who turns [to Allah].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹all as˺ an insight and a reminder to every servant who turns ˹to Allah˺.

ayahs.textArabic: وَنَزَّلۡنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ مُّبَٰرَكٗا فَأَنۢبَتۡنَا بِهِۦ جَنَّٰتٖ وَحَبَّ ٱلۡحَصِيدِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wanazzalna mina alssamai maan mubarakan faanbatna bihi jannatin wahabba alhaseedi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We have sent down blessed rain from the sky and made grow thereby gardens and grain from the harvest
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And We send down blessed rain from the sky, bringing forth gardens and grains for harvest,

ayahs.textArabic: وَٱلنَّخۡلَ بَاسِقَٰتٖ لَّهَا طَلۡعٞ نَّضِيدٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waalnnakhla basiqatin laha talAAun nadeedun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And lofty palm trees having fruit arranged in layers -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and towering palm trees ˹loaded˺ with clustered fruit,

ayahs.textArabic: رِّزۡقٗا لِّلۡعِبَادِۖ وَأَحۡيَيۡنَا بِهِۦ بَلۡدَةٗ مَّيۡتٗاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡخُرُوجُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Rizqan lilAAibadi waahyayna bihi baldatan maytan kathalika alkhurooju
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: As provision for the servants, and We have given life thereby to a dead land. Thus is the resurrection.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹as˺ a provision for ˹Our˺ servants. And with this ˹rain˺ We revive a lifeless land. Similar is the emergence ˹from the graves˺.

ayahs.textArabic: كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوحٖ وَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلرَّسِّ وَثَمُودُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin waashabu alrrassi wathamoodu
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: The people of Noah denied before them, and the companions of the well and Thamud
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Before them, the people of Noah denied ˹the truth,˺ as did the people of the Water-pit, Thamûd,

ayahs.textArabic: وَعَادٞ وَفِرۡعَوۡنُ وَإِخۡوَٰنُ لُوطٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: WaAAadun wafirAAawnu waikhwanu lootin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And 'Aad and Pharaoh and the brothers of Lot
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ’Ȃd, Pharaoh, the kinfolk of Lot,

ayahs.textArabic: وَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡأَيۡكَةِ وَقَوۡمُ تُبَّعٖۚ كُلّٞ كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيدِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waashabu alaykati waqawmu tubbaAAin kullun kaththaba alrrusula fahaqqa waAAeedi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the companions of the thicket and the people of Tubba'. All denied the messengers, so My threat was justly fulfilled.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: the residents of the Forest, and the people of Tubba’. Each rejected ˹their˺ messenger, so My warning was fulfilled.

ayahs.textArabic: أَفَعَيِينَا بِٱلۡخَلۡقِ ٱلۡأَوَّلِۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي لَبۡسٖ مِّنۡ خَلۡقٖ جَدِيدٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: AfaAAayeena bialkhalqi alawwali bal hum fee labsin min khalqin jadeedin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Did We fail in the first creation? But they are in confusion over a new creation.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Were We incapable of creating ˹them˺ the first time? In fact, they are in doubt about ˹their˺ re-creation.

ayahs.textArabic: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ وَنَعۡلَمُ مَا تُوَسۡوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفۡسُهُۥۖ وَنَحۡنُ أَقۡرَبُ إِلَيۡهِ مِنۡ حَبۡلِ ٱلۡوَرِيدِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Walaqad khalaqna alinsana wanaAAlamu ma tuwaswisu bihi nafsuhu wanahnu aqrabu ilayhi min habli alwareedi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We have already created man and know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer to him than [his] jugular vein
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, ˹it is˺ We ˹Who˺ created humankind and ˹fully˺ know what their souls whisper to them, and We are closer to them than ˹their˺ jugular vein.

ayahs.textArabic: إِذۡ يَتَلَقَّى ٱلۡمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ قَعِيدٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Ith yatalaqqa almutalaqqiyani AAani alyameeni waAAani alshshimali qaAAeedun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: When the two receivers receive, seated on the right and on the left.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: As the two recording-angels—˹one˺ sitting to the right, and ˹the other to˺ the left—note ˹everything˺,

ayahs.textArabic: مَّا يَلۡفِظُ مِن قَوۡلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيۡهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Ma yalfithu min qawlin illa ladayhi raqeebun AAateedun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Man does not utter any word except that with him is an observer prepared [to record].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: not a word does a person utter without having a ˹vigilant˺ observer ready ˹to write it down˺.

ayahs.textArabic: وَجَآءَتۡ سَكۡرَةُ ٱلۡمَوۡتِ بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ ذَٰلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنۡهُ تَحِيدُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wajaat sakratu almawti bialhaqqi thalika ma kunta minhu taheedu
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the intoxication of death will bring the truth; that is what you were trying to avoid.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹Ultimately,˺ with the throes of death will come the truth. This is what you were trying to escape!

ayahs.textArabic: وَنُفِخَ فِي ٱلصُّورِۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡوَعِيدِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wanufikha fee alssoori thalika yawmu alwaAAeedi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the Horn will be blown. That is the Day of [carrying out] the threat.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And the Trumpet will be blown. This is the Day ˹you were˺ warned of.

ayahs.textArabic: وَجَآءَتۡ كُلُّ نَفۡسٖ مَّعَهَا سَآئِقٞ وَشَهِيدٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wajaat kullu nafsin maAAaha saiqun washaheedun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And every soul will come, with it a driver and a witness.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Each soul will come forth with an angel to drive it and another to testify.

ayahs.textArabic: لَّقَدۡ كُنتَ فِي غَفۡلَةٖ مِّنۡ هَٰذَا فَكَشَفۡنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ حَدِيدٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Laqad kunta fee ghaflatin min hatha fakashafna AAanka ghitaaka fabasaruka alyawma hadeedun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [It will be said], "You were certainly in unmindfulness of this, and We have removed from you your cover, so your sight, this Day, is sharp."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹It will be said to the denier,˺ “You were totally heedless of this. Now We have lifted this veil of yours, so Today your sight is sharp!”

ayahs.textArabic: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ هَٰذَا مَا لَدَيَّ عَتِيدٌ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waqala qareenuhu hatha ma ladayya AAateedun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And his companion, [the angel], will say, "This [record] is what is with me, prepared."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And one’s accompanying-angel will say, “Here is the record ready with me.”

ayahs.textArabic: أَلۡقِيَا فِي جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Alqiya fee jahannama kulla kaffarin AAaneedin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Allah will say], "Throw into Hell every obstinate disbeliever,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹It will be said to both angels,˺ “Throw into Hell every stubborn disbeliever,

ayahs.textArabic: مَّنَّاعٖ لِّلۡخَيۡرِ مُعۡتَدٖ مُّرِيبٍ
ayahs.textTransliteration: MannaAAin lilkhayri muAAtadin mureebin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Preventer of good, aggressor, and doubter,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: withholder of good, transgressor, and doubter,

ayahs.textArabic: ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَأَلۡقِيَاهُ فِي ٱلۡعَذَابِ ٱلشَّدِيدِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Allathee jaAAala maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara faalqiyahu fee alAAathabi alshshadeedi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Who made [as equal] with Allah another deity; then throw him into the severe punishment."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: who set up another god with Allah. So cast them into the severe punishment.”

ayahs.textArabic: ۞ قَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ رَبَّنَا مَآ أَطۡغَيۡتُهُۥ وَلَٰكِن كَانَ فِي ضَلَٰلِۭ بَعِيدٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala qareenuhu rabbana ma atghaytuhu walakin kana fee dalalin baAAeedin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: His [devil] companion will say, "Our Lord, I did not make him transgress, but he [himself] was in extreme error."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: One’s ˹devilish˺ associate will say, “Our Lord! I did not make them transgress. Rather, they were far astray ˹on their own˺.”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ لَا تَخۡتَصِمُواْ لَدَيَّ وَقَدۡ قَدَّمۡتُ إِلَيۡكُم بِٱلۡوَعِيدِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala la takhtasimoo ladayya waqad qaddamtu ilaykum bialwaAAeedi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Allah] will say, "Do not dispute before Me, while I had already presented to you the warning.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Allah will respond, “Do not dispute in My presence, since I had already given you a warning.

ayahs.textArabic: مَا يُبَدَّلُ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ لَدَيَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِظَلَّٰمٖ لِّلۡعَبِيدِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Ma yubaddalu alqawlu ladayya wama ana bithallamin lilAAabeedi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: The word will not be changed with Me, and never will I be unjust to the servants."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: My Word cannot be changed, nor am I unjust to ˹My˺ servants.”

ayahs.textArabic: يَوۡمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمۡتَلَأۡتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلۡ مِن مَّزِيدٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Yawma naqoolu lijahannama hali imtalati wataqoolu hal min mazeedin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: On the Day We will say to Hell, "Have you been filled?" and it will say, "Are there some more,"
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹Beware of˺ the Day We will ask Hell, “Are you full ˹yet˺?” And it will respond, “Are there any more?”

ayahs.textArabic: وَأُزۡلِفَتِ ٱلۡجَنَّةُ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ غَيۡرَ بَعِيدٍ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waozlifati aljannatu lilmuttaqeena ghayra baAAeedin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And Paradise will be brought near to the righteous, not far,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And Paradise will be brought near to the righteous, not far off.

ayahs.textArabic: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Hatha ma tooAAadoona likulli awwabin hafeethin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [It will be said], "This is what you were promised - for every returner [to Allah] and keeper [of His covenant]
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹And it will be said to them,˺ “This is what you were promised, for whoever ˹constantly˺ turned ˹to Allah˺ and kept up ˹His commandments˺—

ayahs.textArabic: مَّنۡ خَشِيَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنَ بِٱلۡغَيۡبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلۡبٖ مُّنِيبٍ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Man khashiya alrrahmana bialghaybi wajaa biqalbin muneebin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Who feared the Most Merciful unseen and came with a heart returning [in repentance].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: who were in awe of the Most Compassionate without seeing ˹Him˺, and have come with a heart turning ˹only to Him˺.

ayahs.textArabic: ٱدۡخُلُوهَا بِسَلَٰمٖۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡخُلُودِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Odkhulooha bisalamin thalika yawmu alkhuloodi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Enter it in peace. This is the Day of Eternity."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Enter it in peace. This is the Day of eternal life!”

ayahs.textArabic: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيۡنَا مَزِيدٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Lahum ma yashaoona feeha waladayna mazeedun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: They will have whatever they wish therein, and with Us is more.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: There they will have whatever they desire, and with Us is ˹even˺ more.

ayahs.textArabic: وَكَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُم مِّن قَرۡنٍ هُمۡ أَشَدُّ مِنۡهُم بَطۡشٗا فَنَقَّبُواْ فِي ٱلۡبِلَٰدِ هَلۡ مِن مَّحِيصٍ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin hum ashaddu minhum batshan fanaqqaboo fee albiladi hal min maheesin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And how many a generation before them did We destroy who were greater than them in [striking] power and had explored throughout the lands. Is there any place of escape?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹Imagine˺ how many peoples We destroyed before them, who were far mightier than them. Then ˹when the torment came,˺ they ˹desperately˺ sought refuge in the land. ˹But˺ was there any escape?

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكۡرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلۡبٌ أَوۡ أَلۡقَى ٱلسَّمۡعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna fee thalika lathikra liman kana lahu qalbun aw alqa alssamAAa wahuwa shaheedun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed in that is a reminder for whoever has a heart or who listens while he is present [in mind].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely in this is a reminder for whoever has a ˹mindful˺ heart and lends an attentive ear.

ayahs.textArabic: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا فِي سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٖ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Walaqad khalaqna alssamawati waalarda wama baynahuma fee sittati ayyamin wama massana min lughoobin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We did certainly create the heavens and earth and what is between them in six days, and there touched Us no weariness.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, We created the heavens and the earth and everything in between in six Days, and We were not ˹even˺ touched with fatigue.

ayahs.textArabic: فَٱصۡبِرۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ قَبۡلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمۡسِ وَقَبۡلَ ٱلۡغُرُوبِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Faisbir AAala ma yaqooloona wasabbih bihamdi rabbika qabla tulooAAi alshshamsi waqabla alghuroobi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So be patient, [O Muhammad], over what they say and exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So be patient ˹O Prophet˺ with what they say. And glorify the praises of your Lord before sunrise and before sunset.

ayahs.textArabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡهُ وَأَدۡبَٰرَ ٱلسُّجُودِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wamina allayli fasabbihhu waadbara alssujoodi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [in part] of the night exalt Him and after prostration.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And glorify Him during part of the night and after the prayers.

ayahs.textArabic: وَٱسۡتَمِعۡ يَوۡمَ يُنَادِ ٱلۡمُنَادِ مِن مَّكَانٖ قَرِيبٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: WaistamiAA yawma yunadi almunadi min makanin qareebin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And listen on the Day when the Caller will call out from a place that is near -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And listen! On the Day the caller will call out from a near place,

ayahs.textArabic: يَوۡمَ يَسۡمَعُونَ ٱلصَّيۡحَةَ بِٱلۡحَقِّۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡخُرُوجِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Yawma yasmaAAoona alssayhata bialhaqqi thalika yawmu alkhurooji
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: The Day they will hear the blast [of the Horn] in truth. That is the Day of Emergence [from the graves].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: the Day all will hear the ˹mighty˺ Blast in ˹all˺ truth, that will be the Day of emergence ˹from the graves˺.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نُحۡيِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيۡنَا ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna nahnu nuhyee wanumeetu wailayna almaseeru
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and to Us is the destination
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: It is certainly We Who give life and cause death. And to Us is the final return.

ayahs.textArabic: يَوۡمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ عَنۡهُمۡ سِرَاعٗاۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشۡرٌ عَلَيۡنَا يَسِيرٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Yawma tashaqqaqu alardu AAanhum siraAAan thalika hashrun AAalayna yaseerun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: On the Day the earth breaks away from them [and they emerge] rapidly; that is a gathering easy for Us.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹Beware of˺ the Day the earth will split open, letting them rush forth. That will be an easy gathering for Us.

ayahs.textArabic: نَّحۡنُ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيۡهِم بِجَبَّارٖۖ فَذَكِّرۡ بِٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Nahnu aAAlamu bima yaqooloona wama anta AAalayhim bijabbarin fathakkir bialqurani man yakhafu waAAeedi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: We are most knowing of what they say, and you are not over them a tyrant. But remind by the Qur'an whoever fears My threat.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We know best what they say. And you ˹O Prophet˺ are not ˹there˺ to compel them ˹to believe˺. So remind with the Quran ˹only˺ those who fear My warning.
